interpretation: The frozen v2.4 policy/action stack beat the strongest fair external baseline and separated shams on at least one primary public/real-ish action-cost family. The result is qualified: NAB did not confirm, and C-MAPSS did not separate from the prior v2.2 CRA reference with a positive paired CI, so this is not an incremental v2.4-specific advantage claim yet.
next_gate: Tier 7.4g - Held-Out Policy/Action Confirmation + Reference Separation
